deployments.title: Stable Gallery Identity
deployments.summary: Gallery items now use persisted stable keys so renaming or reordering images no longer triggers delete-and-reupload cycles.

deployments.title: Changelog Standard Tightening
deployments.summary: Enforces direct summaries in [Unreleased] changelog sections and rejects stale "unreleased" wording during release validation.

deployments.title: Hangar License & Categories
deployments.summary: Maps SPDX license identifiers to Hangar's accepted values and suppresses licenseUrl diffs for providers that cannot persist them.

deployments.title: Pluggable State & Project Links
deployments.summary: State persistence is now backend-agnostic via an SPI with the filesystem backend extracted to its own module. Project links map consistently across Terracotta, Modrinth, and Hangar with full Gradle DSL support.

deployments.title: Provider Logic & Project Icons
deployments.summary: Adds a provider logic layer (ProviderLogic, LoaderMapper, PlatformBehavior) and project icon support with upload, update, and delete operations across Modrinth and Hangar.

deployments.title: Artifact Alignment Republish
deployments.summary: Republishes Maven Central artifacts to match the v0.4.0 release tag after the initial upload used an earlier commit.

deployments.title: Gallery & License URLs
deployments.summary: Adds gallery image support and license URL fields across Core, the Gradle plugin, and both providers.

deployments.title: Repo Docs & Destructive Operations
deployments.summary: Adds repo and integration documentation, destructive provider operations for project and version deletion, and reorganizes user docs under a Diátaxis structure.

deployments.title: Hangar Provider & Game Version Detection
deployments.summary: Adds the Hangar provider with JWT authentication and loader-to-platform mapping, plus automatic release type and game version detection from loader descriptors.

deployments.title: YAML Config & Auto-Detection
deployments.summary: Adds terracotta.yml parsing, an extensible loader system with adapters for all major Minecraft platforms, and project metadata auto-detection from project files.

deployments.title: Smoke Testing & Docs Polish
deployments.summary: Adds a smoke-testing release guide, archives test results as structured JSON metrics, and fixes docs deployment reliability.

deployments.title: Changelog & Docs Fixes
deployments.summary: Fixes release tooling to leave an empty Unreleased section after each release and prevents routine pushes from resetting the default docs site version.

deployments.title: Gradle Plugin & Modrinth Provider
deployments.summary: Adds the Gradle plugin with plan and apply tasks, Modrinth provider integration, and automated GitHub releases on tag push.

deployments.title: Initial Release
deployments.summary: Ships canonical project and version domain models, provider abstractions, DiffEngine for semantic operations, and the Core SDK on Maven Central.

deployments.title: Docs Site Overhaul
deployments.summary: Reworked the Last Changes page with multi-module filtering, versionless deployment support, and reordered header. Added docs/CHANGELOG.md and updated all changelog references for the three-tier system.

deployments.title: Initial Docs Site
deployments.summary: Deployed the initial MkDocs Material documentation site to GitHub Pages with Diátaxis-structured content, estimated reading times, and a homepage with feature cards and a plan/apply flowchart.

deployments.title: Repository Description & Homepage
deployments.summary: Updates the GitHub repository description and adds the homepage URL via Pulumi infrastructure stack.

deployments.title: Pulumi Secret Management
deployments.summary: Adds a script to load secrets from .env into Pulumi config and updates the terracotta-github module project configuration.
